title: Bremen Trees
description: 74,939 street trees from Bremen's tree cadastre as a point cloud. Filter by genus, tap a tree for species, planting year, height, crown diameter. The city reads even though no street is drawn. EN/DE toggle.
license_notes: Data from the public tree cadastre of Umweltbetrieb Bremen (ArcGIS MapServer 'WMS_Baumkataster_UBB_offen', layer 0 'Straßenbäume mit Kronenradius'), fetched 2026-04-23. No explicit license is named on the source metadata; used here as a non-commercial visualisation experiment with clear attribution. No runtime dependencies — vanilla HTML/JS with Canvas 2D and Pointer Events.
